strategy: She takes +30% from Death and resists everything else (69% Life, 39% the rest). Bring Death damage or a prism.

Solo, her Arcane Deduction aura is always keyed to your school: every three rounds she gains -20% incoming damage from it for 4 rounds. It is effectively always up, so don't stall waiting for it to drop; the Death boost outweighs it.
She is stunable and beguilable. A stun on your setup or kill round denies her 80%-boosted hits for free.
Standard plan: blades plus Feint over a few rounds, then one big Death hit through her 9,100 health. Keep the fight short.
cheatNotes: Round 1 and every three rounds after, she gives herself a -20% incoming damage aura keyed to a random wizard's school, lasting 4 rounds. Solo that always means your school; in a group, have a hitter whose school she hasn't deducted, or just power through with Death boost.
